title: Async Context Propagation in Middleware
description: Architect high-performance middleware pipelines in Node.js applications. Implement async context propagation for critical request identifiers (e.g., tenant IDs, correlation IDs) and authentication state across asynchronous operations.
objectives: Architect high-performance middleware pipelines in Node.js applications.
Implement async context propagation for critical request identifiers (e.g., tenant IDs, correlation IDs) and authentication state across asynchronous operations.
